title: How Orlando Bravo Built One of the Most Successful Firms in Private Equity
description:
(0:00) Introducing Orlando Bravo

(1:53) Orlando's history, Puerto Rico origins, how he got into private equity

(7:10) How he runs Thoma Bravo: small team, outward facing, mentorship, patience in fundraising

(9:01) Role of PE in the American economy, public perception, underwriting AI risks

(15:23) Deal pricing philosophy, acquiring Boeing's avionics business

(19:24) Thoma Bravo's operating playbook after acquiring a company

(26:16) Thoughts on taking Thoma Bravo public

Thanks to our partners for making this happen!

Solana - Solana is the high performance network powering internet capital markets, payments, and crypto applications. Connect with investors, crypto founders, and entrepreneurs at Solana's global flagship event during Abu Dhabi Finance Week & F1: https://solana.com/breakpoint

OKX - The new way to build your crypto portfolio and use it in daily life. We call it the new money app. https://www.okx.com/

Google Cloud - The next generation of unicorns is building on Google Cloud's industry-leading, fully integrated AI stack: infrastructure, platform, models, agents, and data. https://cloud.google.com/

IREN - IREN AI Cloud, powered by NVIDIA GPUs, provides the scale, performance, and reliability to accelerate your AI journey. https://iren.com/

Oracle - Step into the future of enterprise productivity at Oracle AI Experience Live. https://www.oracle.com/artificial-intelligence/data-ai-events/

Circle - The America-based company behind USDC — a fully-reserved, enterprise-grade stablecoin at the core of the emerging internet financial system. https://www.circle.com/

BVNK - Building stablecoin-powered financial infrastructure that helps businesses send, store, and spend value instantly, anywhere in the world. https://www.bvnk.com/

Polymarket - The world's largest prediction market. https://www.polymarket.com/

analysis.summary: Orlando Bravo discusses his history, how he built Thoma Bravo into a successful private equity firm, and his approach to deal pricing and company operations. He also shares his thoughts on the role of private equity in the American economy and the potential risks of AI. The conversation covers Bravo's background, his management style, and the future of Thoma Bravo.

takeaways.text: Orlando Bravo emphasizes the importance of patience in fundraising
Thoma Bravo focuses on small teams and outward-facing mentorship
Private equity plays a crucial role in the American economy
Underwriting AI risks is essential in private equity
Thoma Bravo's deal pricing philosophy prioritizes long-term value
The firm has a well-defined operating playbook after acquiring a company
Orlando Bravo is cautious about taking Thoma Bravo public

sentiment.notes: The conversation is generally positive, with Orlando Bravo sharing his success story and insights on the private equity industry. However, he also expresses caution about AI risks and the potential challenges of taking Thoma Bravo public.

notable_moments.description: Orlando Bravo discusses his management style and approach to fundraising
He shares his thoughts on the role of private equity in the American economy and AI risks
Bravo explains Thoma Bravo's deal pricing philosophy
